interfaces
  bundle-99.200
    urpf
      admin-state enabled
      address-family ipv4
        admin-state enabled
        mode strict
      !
      address-family ipv6
        admin-state enabled
        mode loose
      !
    !
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end
